Vincenzo_Gamer00 5/10/2023 3:00 AM
e
3:03 AM
Abyss Departments We have brought in a new structure to ensure we are a fully operational and productive guild. Once you reach Consultant, you are encouraged to slot into one of these departments. This gives you an ability to hone in on specific skills you wish to develop, and to help the guild in the most useful way possible. Here are the four different departments and their responsibilities: Operations Department Responsibilities: Discord staff Guild Documentation Community Managemeant Help Other Departments Better understand their Role by Creating Better Documentation Requirement: Consultant Community / Discord Experience Prefer Strategy Department Responsibilities: Town Build, Farm Build, Econmic Build Help Abyss expand by showing off our building skills to new members Requirement: Member Rank Litematica Experience Prefer Tech Department Responsibilities: Setting up Minecraft Chat Client to Dsicord API end Command Control Program Advance Guild and Community Management Feature With Discord Bot Requirement: General Manager Rank Progamming Experience Java Prefer Human Resources Department Responsibilities: Recruite New Member Give Tour to member Assign Town Plot Assign Role in Discord Handel Discord Tickets Help Answer Question Related to Abyss Requirement: Member Rank Customer Service Experience Prefer Credits Here at Abyss, we reward the work you do with credits and gold (1 gold = 1p). You can earn them by doing things in #deleted-channel listing and posting the proof in #📥┃job-proof. With these credits, you can save up for these milestones below: 200 credits - Ability to join a department in Abyss 400 credits - Consultant Role + Abyss Tag 1.5k credits - Ability to Apply for Project Manager + Custom Discord Profile Picture 2.5k credits - Ability to Apply for Project Manager + 50% cost cover for /fly in every server with Abyss 4.0k credits - Ability to Apply for Director, Prince, King Abyss Warps (Open a ticket in #🎫┃support to get your perms): /pw Abyss - Main Town Profit Farm (Member Access): /pw AbyssSp - Spawner Loot (check discord for updated PW password) /pw AbyssGF - Guardian Farm (Buy $0.04 : Sell $1.6) /pw AbyssIG - Iron & Sugarcane (Buy $2 : Sell $4) (As Cheap as $0.01) /pw AbyssML - Monster Mob Loot (As Cheap as $0.01) /pw AbyssCF - Cactus farm + Bee Farm (Buy $0.05 : Sell $0.15) /pw AbyssPF - Gold & Slime Farm /pw AbyssPots - Cheap PvP Potions /pw AbyssPO - Pillager Outpost Other Warps: (Open a ticket in #🎫┃support to get your perms) /pw AbyssXP - XP Farm /pw AbyssSG - Manual Sugarcane Farm /pw AbyssTD - Villager Trading District (Enchant Book) /pw AbyssRF - Raid Farm (Emerald and Totem) /pw AbyssNW - Manual Nether Wart Farm /pw AbyssWF - Wither Skeleton Farm /pw AbyssTF - Pigling Trading Farm (Soul Speed) Please refer to our document below to find out more about the guild: https://bit.ly/AbyssSpecialties

Abyss Recruiter Guide
Your Role As a Recruiter here at Abyss, your job is to help expand our guild to new members and to create ways of getting our guild out into the world. You will have the following permissions on DIscord: Nickname Perms, Edit Roles and Message Deletion Perms. You will be told how to use these perm...
Abyss Gaming - Recruiting template
Abyss Gaming Welcome to Abyss Gaming! We are a 4-year-old Minecraft gaming community that has been sticking together for 6+ servers. Abyss has been one of the best-known guilds in the Towny/Survival community, but we need you! As much as you want to be around those that feel like family...
Abyss Specialities
General Note Here in Abyss, we are not just all about games, we offer you ways to develop as a person and find out more about yourself and support your growth. Listed below are some of the skills you could pick up as part of being in Abyss: Business Macro: Focusing on the big picture. Micro: F...
Abyss Staff Structure (CosmosMC)
General Note Members can be pulled up through the hierarchy if all the kings see a sizable amount of potential in them. Anything from conversations that were held in the past to current contributions can be taken into account. These types of promotions are considered special cases and can have e...
